message:
chore: add test dependencies and build script infrastructure

**Workspace dependencies:**
- proptest 1.9.0: Property-based testing framework
- mockall 0.14.0: Mock generation for trait-based testing

**Build infrastructure:**
- build.rs: Build script for compile-time metadata
- vergen-gix 9.1.0: Git/build info injection (version, commit, rustc)

This enables:
1. Comprehensive property-based tests with proptest
2. Mock generation for async trait testing
3. Runtime build metadata (git sha, build time, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
